user_visible_consequence: Provider mutations would be denied until a fresh approval is minted under the new policy epoch. Support exports would include the old and new policy epochs without raw bundle bodies.
degraded_mode_consequences: surface:connected-provider:publish => blocked_by_policy: Provider mutations would be denied until a fresh approval is minted under the new policy epoch.
surface:support:policy-handoff => read_only: Support exports would include the old and new policy epochs without raw bundle bodies.
stale_offline_notes: stale/offline replay must refresh policy epoch before applying policy-bundle:enterprise-beta:2026.05.1

user_visible_consequence: AI apply remains previewable, but provider-route changes require admin review.
degraded_mode_consequences: surface:ai:apply => preview_only: AI apply remains previewable, but provider-route changes require admin review.
stale_offline_notes: stale/offline replay must refresh policy epoch before applying settings:ai-provider-route:locked-mirror-only
